name: Improvado
tagline: AI-powered marketing data aggregation and reporting
description: Improvado automates marketing data collection from 500+ sources, transforming it into unified dashboards. It uses AI to detect anomalies, forecast performance, and eliminate manual reporting.
creator: Improvement

name: Vellum
tagline: AI agent builder for marketing workflows
description: Vellum is a visual platform for building, testing, and deploying AI agent workflows. Marketers describe what they want and Vellum builds the automation pipeline with no learning curve.
creator: Vellum

name: Demandbase
tagline: AI-powered account-based marketing platform
description: Demandbase uses AI agents to identify high-value accounts, personalize outreach, and orchestrate multi-channel ABM campaigns. It unifies sales and marketing data for精准targeting.
creator: Demandbase

name: Surfer SEO
tagline: AI content optimization for search rankings
description: Surfer SEO uses NLP and SERP analysis to guide content creation with real-time optimization scores. It analyzes top-ranking pages and provides data-driven recommendations for structure, keywords, and headings.
creator: Surfer

name: Manus
tagline: General-purpose AI agent for complex tasks
description: Manus is a general-purpose AI agent that can browse the web, write code, create documents, and complete multi-step tasks autonomously. It gained viral attention in 2025 for its ability to handle diverse real-world tasks.
creator: Manus

name: WorkBeaver
tagline: Describe tasks and AI executes them for you
description: WorkBeaver lets users describe tasks in natural language and the AI agent executes them across applications. It learns from demonstrations and automates repetitive business workflows without coding.
creator: WorkBeaver

name: Landbase
tagline: AI SDR agents that boost conversions by 70%
description: Landbase provides agentic AI sales development reps that autonomously prospect, personalize outreach, and book meetings. It claims 70% higher conversion rates compared to traditional SDR methods.
creator: Landbase

name: Roo Code
tagline: Open-source AI coding agent for VS Code
description: Roo Code (formerly Roo-Cline) is an open-source AI coding agent that runs in VS Code. It can read, write, and execute code with full terminal access, supporting multiple LLM providers.
creator: Roo Code

name: Firebase Studio
tagline: Google's AI-powered full-stack app builder
description: Firebase Studio (formerly Project IDX) is Google's cloud-based AI development environment for building full-stack apps. It integrates Gemini AI, Android emulators, and one-click deployment to Firebase hosting.
creator: Google

name: Databricks Mosaic AI
tagline: Unified data and AI platform with agent capabilities
description: Databricks Mosaic AI combines data lakehouse architecture with AI model training and deployment. It enables data teams to build, deploy, and monitor AI agents on a unified platform with governed data access.
creator: Databricks

name: MotherDuck
tagline: Serverless analytics database with AI features
description: MotherDuck is a serverless DuckDB-based analytics database that runs queries locally and in the cloud. It offers AI-powered data exploration and integrates with popular data tools for fast, lightweight analytics.
creator: MotherDuck

name: Notion Mail
tagline: AI-first email client integrated with Notion workspace
description: Notion Mail is an AI-powered email client that integrates deeply with Notion's workspace. It uses AI to categorize, draft, and organize emails while connecting messages to projects, docs, and databases.
creator: Notion

name: Raycast AI
tagline: AI-powered launcher and productivity tool for Mac
description: Raycast AI extends the popular Mac launcher with AI capabilities including code generation, text transformation, and quick answers. It integrates with hundreds of apps and supports custom AI commands.
creator: Raycast

name: Gong
tagline: AI revenue intelligence platform for sales teams
description: Gong uses AI to analyze sales calls, emails, and meetings to provide revenue intelligence. It reveals what top performers do differently, predicts deal outcomes, and coaches reps in real-time.
creator: Gong

name: Clari
tagline: AI-powered revenue operations and forecasting
description: Clari uses AI to predict revenue outcomes, identify pipeline risks, and automate revenue operations. It gives sales leaders visibility into every deal and forecast with machine learning accuracy.
creator: Clari

name: Phenom
tagline: AI-powered talent experience management platform
description: Phenom uses AI to personalize the entire talent lifecycle from recruitment to retention. It provides intelligent career sites, AI-matched candidates, automated interview scheduling, and employee growth recommendations.
creator: Phenom

name: Ramp
tagline: AI-powered corporate card and spend management
description: Ramp is a finance platform that uses AI to automate expense management, detect savings opportunities, and enforce spending policies. It offers corporate cards with built-in controls and real-time spend analytics.
creator: Ramp

name: Brex
tagline: AI-powered spend management for enterprises
description: Brex provides AI-driven corporate cards, expense management, and bill pay for enterprises. It uses machine learning to categorize expenses, flag anomalies, and automate financial operations.
creator: Brex

name: Shopify Sidekick
tagline: AI assistant for Shopify store management
description: Shopify Sidekick is an AI-powered assistant that helps merchants manage their stores through natural language. It can create discounts, analyze sales data, generate product descriptions, and automate marketing tasks.
creator: Shopify

name: Narrator
tagline: AI-powered customer data platform for ecommerce
description: Narrator is a customer data platform that uses AI to unify data from multiple sources into a single customer timeline. It enables ecommerce brands to understand customer behavior and personalize experiences.
creator: Narrator

name: Ironclad
tagline: AI-powered contract lifecycle management
description: Ironclad uses AI to manage the entire contract lifecycle from drafting to execution to analysis. It automates contract review, extracts key terms, and provides insights across contract portfolios.
creator: Ironclad

name: Suno
tagline: AI music generation from text prompts
description: Suno creates full songs with vocals, instruments, and lyrics from simple text prompts. Users can describe a genre, mood, or topic and get a complete, radio-quality song in seconds.
creator: Suno

name: ElevenLabs
tagline: AI voice generation and cloning platform
description: ElevenLabs provides hyper-realistic AI voice generation, cloning, and text-to-speech. It supports 29+ languages, voice cloning from short samples, and is used for audiobooks, podcasts, and content creation.
creator: ElevenLabs

name: Rosebud
tagline: AI-powered game creation platform
description: Rosebud enables anyone to create games using natural language descriptions. It generates game logic, assets, and mechanics from text prompts, making game development accessible to non-programmers.
creator: Rosebud

name: ListedKit
tagline: AI transaction coordinator for real estate agents
description: ListedKit automates real estate transaction management with AI-powered document extraction, deadline tracking, and client communication. It saves agents 10+ hours per transaction.
creator: ListedKit

name: Aidoc
tagline: AI radiology platform for medical imaging analysis
description: Aidoc uses AI to analyze medical images in real-time, detecting critical findings like intracranial hemorrhage, pulmonary embolism, and cervical spine fractures. It prioritizes urgent cases for radiologists.
creator: Aidoc

name: Khanmigo
tagline: AI tutor by Khan Academy for personalized learning
description: Khanmigo is an AI-powered tutor built by Khan Academy that guides students through problems using the Socratic method. It doesn't give answers but asks questions to build understanding across math, science, and humanities.
creator: Khan Academy

name: PagerDuty AI
tagline: AI-powered incident management and response
description: PagerDuty uses AI to automate incident detection, triage, and response. It reduces alert noise, identifies critical incidents, and orchestrates automated remediation workflows across the infrastructure stack.
creator: PagerDuty

name: project44
tagline: AI-powered supply chain visibility platform
description: project44 provides real-time supply chain visibility using AI to predict ETAs, detect disruptions, and optimize logistics. It tracks shipments across all modes and provides predictive analytics for supply chain leaders.
creator: project44

name: FourKites
tagline: AI supply chain visibility and predictive analytics
description: FourKites uses AI to provide end-to-end supply chain visibility with predictive ETAs, automated workflows, and exception management. It tracks millions of shipments across ocean, road, rail, and air.
creator: FourKites

name: Consensus
tagline: AI-powered academic research search engine
description: Consensus uses AI to search and synthesize findings from 200M+ scientific papers. It provides evidence-based answers to research questions with direct citations from peer-reviewed studies.
creator: Consensus

name: Zowie
tagline: AI agent platform for autonomous customer support
description: Zowie is an enterprise AI agent that resolves customer issues end-to-end without human handoff. It integrates with CRM, OMS, and helpdesk systems, achieving 70-95% automation rates with zero hallucinations.
creator: Zowie

name: ManyChat
tagline: AI chatbot for Instagram, Messenger, and SMS
description: ManyChat automates conversations across Instagram DMs, Facebook Messenger, SMS, and WhatsApp. It's popular for marketing automation, lead generation, and customer engagement on social platforms.
creator: ManyChat

name: SentinelOne
tagline: AI-powered autonomous endpoint and cloud security
description: SentinelOne provides autonomous endpoint protection using AI to detect, prevent, and respond to threats in real-time. It offers XDR capabilities across endpoints, cloud workloads, and identity systems.
creator: SentinelOne

name: AccuKnox
tagline: AI-powered cloud-native and Kubernetes security
description: AccuKnox provides AI-driven security for cloud-native and Kubernetes environments. Its AI CoPilot generates security policies, enforces zero-trust, and provides runtime visibility using eBPF technology.
creator: AccuKnox

name: Wiz
tagline: AI-powered cloud security platform
description: Wiz provides cloud security by scanning AWS, Azure, GCP, and Kubernetes for misconfigurations, vulnerabilities, and risks. It uses AI to prioritize threats and provide actionable remediation guidance.
creator: Wiz

name: Weights & Biases
tagline: ML experiment tracking and model management platform
description: Weights & Biases (W&B) provides experiment tracking, model management, and data versioning for ML teams. It helps researchers and engineers track experiments, visualize results, and collaborate on model development.
creator: Weights & Biases

name: Deepgram
tagline: AI speech-to-text and voice AI platform
description: Deepgram provides enterprise-grade speech recognition, text-to-speech, and voice AI APIs. It offers real-time and batch transcription with 95%+ accuracy across 30+ languages.
creator: Deepgram

name: Babylon Health
tagline: AI-powered digital health platform
description: Babylon Health provides AI-driven symptom checking, triage, and virtual consultations. It uses machine learning to assess symptoms, provide health guidance, and connect patients with healthcare professionals.
creator: Babylon Health
